data.title: Wall Street traders predict S&P 500 to soar to 7600-7800 by Dec. 31, 2026 according to Kalshi, with 19% wagers in that range.
data.description: Traders on Kalshi predict that the S&P 500 will reach between 7600 and 7800 by December 31, 2026. Currently, 19% of traders foresee the index closing within this range. This forecast suggests a bullish sentiment, projecting a continued uptrend for the benchmark index tracking major U.S. stocks. In 2025, the S&P 500 saw gains of approximately 16-18% amid a volatile year influenced by President Donald Trump's actions. These insights are drawn from a prediction market contract on Kalshi regarding the S&P 500's year-end 2026 performance.

data.title: ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. released Q4 2025 results, showing performance compared to 2024 with significant changes.
data.description: In Sparta, Michigan on January 30, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: COFS), the holding company for ChoiceOne Bank, disclosed financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The report highlighted key factors influencing results for the comparable periods in 2024 and 2025.

data.title: Bonaccord Capital Partners named 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News.
data.description: P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), a prominent private markets solutions provider, and Bonaccord Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in offering growth capital and strategic assistance to middle-market private market sponsors, have jointly declared that Bonaccord has been honored with the title of 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News. This recognition underscores Bonaccord's exceptional performance in the industry. The acknowledgment solidifies their position as a leading entity in this sector.

data.title: Trump criticizes Fed Chair Powell for keeping interest rates high, says rates will drop 'a lot' with new Chair. Announcement coming soon. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: President Donald Trump once again criticized the Federal Reserve and Chair Jerome Powell for maintaining high interest rates, expressing his belief that rates will drop substantially with the next Chair. During a speech in Iowa, Trump accused Powell of being too slow and hesitant in implementing monetary policies, referring to him as "too late." Trump suggested that Powell is intentionally keeping borrowing costs high, alleging that Powell "wants to keep rates as high as possible," despite his administration's efforts to lower rates. With Powell's impending departure in May, Trump stated that a new "great" Fed chairman will be appointed soon. Trump's comments were made during a speech in Iowa, where he expressed his confidence that interest rates will see significant declines in the near future.

data.title: Society Pass, NusaTrip, and Gother partner for flight distribution in $84 billion Thailand travel market. Strengthen NusaTrip's presence.
data.description: Jakarta, Indonesia - January 30, 2026 - Society Pass Incorporated (Nasdaq: SOPA), a leading digital ecosystem in Southeast Asia, and its majority-owned subsidiary NusaTrip Inc (Nasdaq: NUTR), a prominent travel technology platform in Southeast Asia and Asia-Pacific, have announced a strategic collaboration with Search Engine Optimization Company Limited (“Gother”), an emerging online travel agency in Thailand. Through this partnership, NusaTrip will provide flight content to Gother, expanding air travel distribution in Thailand and across Southeast Asia. This move reinforces NusaTrip's position as a key flight content provider in the regional travel industry.

data.description: Watch the informative documentary video on the potential of natural hydrogen in Saskatchewan, highlighting MAX Power's efforts in the sector. Learn more at the provided link for insights into this innovative energy source.

data.title: OR Royalties appoints Kevin Thomson to its Board of Directors, while William Murray John resigns.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, OR Royalties Inc. appointed Mr. Kevin Thomson as an Independent Director to its Board of Directors. The company, listed as OR on both the TSX and NYSE, also disclosed the resignation of Mr. William Murray John from the Board, with immediate effect.

data.title: HPQ confirms pilot-scale fumed silica meets grade 150, replicating lab findings in a scalable plasma process.
data.description: HPQ has verified that pilot-scale fumed silica has achieved a commercial grade of 150, matching the results obtained in the laboratory. This development confirms the effectiveness of a plasma process that can be scaled up for commercial production.

data.title: WisdomTree beats Q4 estimated EPS by 26% ($0.29 vs $0.23) with revenue up $36.74 million compared to last year.
data.description: WisdomTree (NYSE: WT) released its Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The key highlights include surpassing estimated earnings by 26.0%, with an EPS of $0.29 compared to the expected $0.23. Revenue showed significant growth, increasing by $36.74 million from the previous year. For a more detailed report, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable's Q4 earnings show significant beat with EPS of $0.54, up 246.0% from estimates. Revenue rises by $107.00 million.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, at 07:00 AM, Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP) disclosed its Q4 earnings, surpassing expectations significantly. The company reported earnings per share (EPS) of $0.54, exceeding the estimated value of $-0.37 by 246.0%. Furthermore, their revenue for the quarter increased by $107.00 million compared to the previous year. Brookfield Renewable has a history of outperforming on EPS. For further details, the complete article can be viewed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Company Alterity Therapeutics releases Q2 FY26 cash flow report, along with corporate update.
data.description: In recent findings, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, which is the lowest it has been in the past three years. This decrease in unemployment is significant as it represents a 0.5% dip from the previous quarter. Additionally, it was noted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs, marking a positive trend in job creation. These numbers highlight a promising outlook for the labor market and suggest potential growth and stability in the near future.
